name: pptlive
description: Read and edit the Microsoft PowerPoint deck you have open right now, live, directly inside Claude.
long_description: pptlive's built-in MCP server, packaged for one-click install. Drives a running Microsoft PowerPoint instance over COM (Windows only): read slides, shapes, tables, charts, SmartArt, and theme/master styling; make polite edits (text, formatting, layouts, shapes, pictures, deck-wide styling) that preserve the user's viewed slide and selection and collapse into a single Ctrl-Z; render slides or shapes to images a vision model can see; and drive a live slide show. Five compact dispatch tools (ppt_read / ppt_edit / ppt_render / ppt_show / ppt_batch) addressed by hierarchical anchors.
